name: Examination - Sector-1
description:
"You are going nowhere but to hell... I hope you like it there."

Examination is a PvE horror shooter, where you're tasked to clear a highly irradiated nuclear facility that's turned into a laboratory following the "WE-30" outbreak, an infection that's taken the whole city of Menlo by storm. You're one of the later waves sent to the facility. What fate has befallen to the earlier waves is unknown.

Just don't become one of them.

Aradus Note: Be sure to check out my Discord on my Information bot, if you have any requests! Oh yeah, and check out the Characthers and Forces down below, I've described them already so you don't have to check what Examination is all about! Please, my hands are bleeding-

You're an MGF Soldier, equipped with a breacher shotgun, a Rads Geiger, a bandage wrap, and a sidearm.

What is about to happen might just be your last time seeing the sun, once inside you're all alone with your squad.

Something lurks. They lunge at you, They will dodge your attacks, They evolve, They mutate, They learn.

Characthers

-The Elephant's Foot

The Elephants Foot is a mysterious, molten-black mass deep within the facility, believed to be the site of the original reactor meltdown. It pulses with immense radiation, and while the pull it once had has weakened... It still wants you.

-Normal Infected

Easy to kill. A good warm-up for your trigger finger.

Often found in groups, but individually they’re not a threat unless you're not paying attention.

-Hazmat Riser

Yellow-suited nightmares.

These infected don’t just walk — they dart, dodge and generally act like they’re on a mission.

-Slasher

You’ll see the red glow in their eyes before you hear the axe swing. And by then, it might be too late.

Forces

Menlonian Ground Forces

formerly known as the MGF is the military division that fought against the infected, creating checkpoints around high-risk zones along with the HPCA, these checkpoints are known as White Zones

The Rasonian Infantry Forces

Sent to white zones with the objective of evacuating Rasonian civilians, they made an encounter with the MGF creating a dispute between both military forces.

The Republic of Askaria

Askaria prioritized human efforts to Menlo, it opened its borders to refugees, establishing safe zones and providing shelter, they gave food supplies and psychological support to refugees, Askaria also supplied the IDO with weaponry, also deploying soldiers to the frontlines after a criticism of not sending military support.

Aresiän Democratic Union

They were one of the biggest Menlo's political adversaries, despite this, the Aresiän government offered assistance in the effort to control the virus, Menlo accepted the offer and Aresius began to work alongside HPCA, however, they were attempting to weaponize
creator: Aradus Czar Katleo
